characters.name: Charles (character)
characters.description: Charles is a Good-As-Gold gray mouse who usually is seen with Yoko, Timothy, and Lily. He is also seen sometimes playing with Nora. He wears a red shirt and blue overalls. He as a mom namedOilviaa dad namedXavierand an auntie. He is 8 years old.

characters.name: Doris
characters.description: Doris is one of Timothy's classmate. She doesn't play with Timothy but she is friends with Charles and Lily. But when Lily arrived at the school on her first day it was snowing and Doris got asked to help her but she got lost. She is one of the oldest in the class but she has three older brothers. Horace, Morris, and Boris. She is six years old. She also has an uncle named Norris as it was mentioned in the thirty-eighth episode When I Grow Up.

characters.name: Henry
characters.description: Milo Powell Magic School Bus Magic School BusMilo Powell Henry is hilltop school caretake. He drives the school bus as well. He was a student in the school and Mrs Jenkins was his teacher who was called Miss Applecrafty. He is around his 50s. In Timothy takes the plung, Mrs Jenkins is also shown driving Henry's bus.

characters.name: Juanita
characters.description: Juanita:The Newest Student; The New Resident:where she lives seem to her a bit strange: New Place, Even with new classmates, trying to fit in is not easy. The Problem: Misses Jenkins Class has everything down pat synchronized, with Experience they know their way around, and hang with their mention; known Group of Friends. (Juanita Mother will be always be at her side.)  Juanita being nervous does not want her Mother to leave her alone. To soon Break out of her shyness and to find friends and those similar to her. Juanita felt a little left out and wanted to feel like part of Group Companions, and fit in as their classmate.

characters.name: Nora
characters.description: Nora is a bole brown who is nutty and stupid. She got her nickname from the books "Noisy Nora" And "Throw It Away, Nora" She has a mom namedRubya dad namedKena sister namedKateand a baby brother namedJack. She wears a purple dress. She Is 8 Years Old She Likes Charles But She Gets A Hot-Temper When Ruby And Ken Kicks Nora Out Of The House
